name: Tor
description: Control the Tor network from Quick Settings: one-click on/off (uses the distro's own tor.service via polkit — no extra tor instance), exit-country picker, live bootstrap progress, New Identity, obfs4 bridges, circuit viewer, and tap-to-copy SOCKS5 endpoint. Talks to tor's ControlPort directly for runtime config. Optional transparent-proxy mode via bundled tun2socks installer routes ALL TCP traffic through Tor (one-time sudo, zero password at runtime).
